description:
Agend’App is a platform currently in development, designed for beauty and wellness professionals. It supports them in the day-to-day management of their activities by centralising staff and equipment scheduling, as well as appointment and leave management.

The project offers a web-based administration interface connected to a mobile application, in order to stay close to what happens on the ground. Designed to evolve, Agend’App aims to adapt to different types of businesses and to international use.
